expectations.text: Output is a valid .docx that opens without errors
expectations.evidence: Opened Hotel Comparison Report - Martinez_Chen.docx: 67 paragraphs, 2 tables

expectations.text: Every blank spacer paragraph is exactly 6pt or 10pt — no 10.5pt or default-size blank paragraphs anywhere
expectations.evidence: 10 6pt spacers, 4 10pt spacers, offending blank sizes: none

expectations.text: All body paragraphs have space before = 0 and space after = 0 (except the 14pt-after dates line)
Both rate tables fit within the usable page width and the Offered Rate column is shaded gray (D9D9D9)
expectations.evidence: too wide: none; gray shading per table: [True, True]

expectations.text: TripAdvisor ranking lines use exactly the format '#X of Y Hotels in Savannah' and are hyperlinked to the TripAdvisor URLs provided
expectations.evidence: found rankings: ['#24 of 141 Hotels in Savannah', '#67 of 141 Hotels in Savannah']; tripadvisor hyperlink rels present: True

expectations.text: Divider lines between hotel sections use the thinThickThinMediumGap paragraph border with exactly one 10pt spacer before and after
expectations.evidence: divider style present: True; 10pt spacer adjacency ok: True

expectations.text: Rate data is accurate: DeSoto Deluxe King $249/$419 and Hyatt City View King $209/$359 appear in the tables
The JC Room Blocks contact line appears exactly once, as the last paragraph of the document
expectations.evidence: occurrences: 1; last non-empty paragraph is contact line: True
